## [Note]

dbbot v0.12.0 refreshes support metadata so MySQL package resolution is based on the supported version ranges instead of only representative latest patch releases.

## [Add]

- Add concrete Oracle Linux Generic package records and MD5 checksums for supported MySQL 5.7, 8.0, 8.4, and 9.7 package versions that are published by Oracle download pages.
- Add checksum metadata for related MySQL Shell and MySQL Router packages used by InnoDB Cluster and Router flows.

## [Change]

- Show `dbbotctl support list` as a compact table by default; use `--full` or `-G` to include CPU architecture and notes.
- Render MySQL support versions as supported ranges, such as `5.7.x>=5.7.26`, instead of listing only the package rows currently present in the matrix.

## [Fix]

- Verify MySQL Shell and MySQL Router package checksums during automatic download and local package preparation when support metadata provides those checksums.
